text: Email schedules Epstein for Gulfstream flight training class May 31-June 2 and Bell 407 helicopter training in West Palm Beach June 6-7

Epstein announces Rome→Dubai→Abu Dhabi (ruler meetings)→Saudi Arabia→Senegal→Paris itinerary; Ian Osborne to meet him in Rome

location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Karyna coordinated to arrive Little St. James alone on Friday from Moscow, return NY Monday; helicopter with Woody Allen arrives evening
